overall.description: Third-person game engine footage of a medieval fantasy character harvesting resources at an outdoor workshop. The armored character repeatedly strikes a vegetation node with a tool near a stone furnace structure in a rustic camp setting with rocky terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor workshop with stone furnace and resource node

agents.ego_description: character performs repetitive harvesting animation, swinging a tool at a bush resource node next to the rock wall

entered.detail: domed stone building with arched opening and metal chimney, appears to be a furnace or kiln
large dark boulders forming a natural rock barrier
clump of dry vegetation and branches that the character is harvesting
cut log stumps on the ground near the stone structure
partial view of straw or reed roofing in the background

segments.scene_description: The scene shows a static third-person view of a medieval fantasy character in quilted armor harvesting resources at an outdoor workshop. The character stands between a stone oven structure on the left and a rock wall on the right, repeatedly swinging a tool at a bush node. The environment is a narrow enclosed dirt area with wooden stumps in the foreground and a thatched roof visible in the distant background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady third-person perspective of a medieval fantasy character performing resource harvesting within a rustic outdoor workshop. It begins with the character in quilted armor positioned in a narrow dirt enclosure, repeatedly swinging a tool at a bush node. The camera remains fixed as the character works between a stone oven structure on the left and a rugged rock wall on the right. The view encompasses wooden stumps in the immediate foreground before extending toward a thatched roof visible in the distant background.
